column1: RENTAL PROPERTY ANALYZER PRO - INSTRUCTIONS & USER GUIDE
WELCOME TO YOUR RENTAL PROPERTY ANALYZER
Enter your property information in the Property Details worksheet:
- Cap Rate (Net Operating Income / Purchase Price)
- Cash-on-Cash Return (Annual Cash Flow / Cash Invested)
- Total ROI including appreciation and tax benefits
The Property Comparison worksheet helps you:
Cash-on-Cash = Annual Cash Flow / Cash Invested
• Keep mileage logs for property visits
• Consult E&N Tax for optimization strategies
Updates: Annual tax law changes included
